What the Scorecard shows

The Scorecard confirms performance across two dimensions: Value and Risk. These determine whether a site is helping the organisation or holding it back.

Value fundamentals

Experience, SEO and Integrity

Risk fundamentals

Accessibility. Privacy, Carbon

Grading that directs action

A = acceptable ‘today’ //  E = significant need

Grades make it clear where action is required and where time is being wasted. They give teams a starting point to brief, prioritise, and plan.

Name: Discovery
Subheading: Discovery is a revenue-generating service that uncovers hidden ‘Zombie Websites’ - giving agencies a powerful value-add for clients, opening doors to wider projects, and positioning you as the partner who finds and fixes what others miss.
Rich Text 1:
Discovery is an application of ACTIVE that uncovers the hidden digital estate - the sites organisations don’t know exist, but which still carry risk.

These so-called “Zombie Websites” accumulate over time through legacy projects, expired campaigns, departmental initiatives, or abandoned sub-domains, yet continue to consume resources and expose the organisation.

Earn today:

Using the intelligence to create a master profiling from present websites, using Ai to profile content of linked and associated website and mapping of domains and IP matches. Take to clients, Ai / innovation, identifying the unknown, and then project manage clean up / site removal.

Why it matters:

  • Scale of the unknown: Audits show that around 32% of websites in government and public sector, and 41% across commercial organisations, are not visible to their own digital teams.
  • Cost impact: Unknown sites consume hosting, licences, and maintenance spend without delivering value.
  • Brand and compliance risk: Out-of-date content damages reputation and creates exposure around privacy and accessibility.
  • Cyber risk: An estimated 18% of hacks or unauthorised access originate from websites outside digital team control.

How it helps:

  • Uses AiSC’s AI engine to build a profile of the known and unknown estate.
  • Identifies up to 85% of unknown sites, surfacing hidden risks and costs.
  • Provides organisations with a structured view of their true footprint, including active, legacy, and unmanaged websites.
